reason: Agent successfully used GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated username after granting account access
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar displaying agents
Clicked on "QA-20260425-012209-bhu3" agent in sidebar — Agent page loaded and agent status was "idle"
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status confirmed as "idle" at top of page
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." in message input — Message displayed in textbox
Sent message with Cmd+Enter — Message submitted, new session created, agent transitioned to "working" status
Waited 3 seconds for response — GitHub account access request card appeared after agent processing
Verified GitHub access request card appeared with GitHub account already selected — Card displayed "Allow access to GitHub to look up the authenticated username?" with GitHub checkbox checked
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button — Access granted, agent transitioned back to "working" status to process GitHub API call
Waited for API permission review — API Request Review dialog appeared asking "Allow get the authenticated user?"
Clicked "Allow" button on API review — Permission dialog opened with options for permission scope
Clicked "Allow Once" button — Permission granted, agent continued processing
Waited for final response — Agent completed work and returned response "Your GitHub username is yiw190." with status changed to "idle"
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response clearly states "Your GitHub username is yiw190." — Test requirement satisfied
